category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/google/bundletool says bundletool manipulates Android App Bundles and Android SDK Bundles.
source_facts.description says it manipulates Android App Bundles.
display_name_sources: Official repository heading at https://github.com/google/bundletool is bundletool.
docs_sources: Official repository README links to developer.android.com command-line bundletool documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/google/bundletool, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/google/bundletool lists App Bundle, APK Set, APK extraction/install, device spec, and SDK Bundle capabilities.
